title: Non-record: 1x RTX 3090 baseline run (sp1024, 1 shard)
body:
This PR adds a non-record baseline run under:

records/track_non_record_16mb/2026-03-21_3090_Baseline_Run1/

Highlights:
- hardware: 1x RTX 3090 on RunPod
- dataset/tokenizer: fineweb10B_sp1024 / fineweb_1024_bpe.model
- train shards: 1
- in-run val_bpb: 1.5516
- final int8+zlib roundtrip val_bpb: 1.57290593
- compressed submission size: 9,283,646 bytes

This is a documented non-record baseline, not an official 8xH100 leaderboard-equivalent submission.
